name: Sekichu Co., Ltd.
summary: Sekichu Co., Ltd. operates home solution centers. It also operates car supplies and bicycle specialty stores. The company was formerly known as Sekiguchi Mokuzai Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sekichu Co., Ltd. in July 1977. Sekichu Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Takasaki, Japan.
